issue_summary: CompositeSet: remove inheritance from CompositeCollection, update mutator class and unit tests.
javadoc_before:
/** * Decorates a set of other sets to provide a single unified view. *

* Changes made to this set will actually be made on the decorated set. * Add operations require the use of a pluggable strategy. * If no strategy is provided then add is unsupported. * * @since 3.0 * @version $Id$ */
javadoc_after:
/** * Decorates a set of other sets to provide a single unified view. *

* Changes made to this set will actually be made on the decorated set. * Add operations require the use of a pluggable strategy. * If no strategy is provided then add is unsupported. *

* From version 4.0, this class does not extend {@link CompositeCollection} * anymore due to its input restrictions (only accepts Sets). * See COLLECTIONS-424 * for more details. * * @since 3.0 * @version $Id$ */
